questions.q: Write a formal letter to the editor of a newspaper expressing your views on the increasing use of plastic bags in your city.
questions.answer: Sample answer: Start with a formal greeting, introduce the topic, express your views, and conclude with a call to action.

questions.q: Fill in the blanks: A formal letter usually begins with a _______________ (formal/informal) greeting.
What is the purpose of writing a formal letter to the Principal of your school requesting a character certificate? Explain in 30 words.
questions.answer: To obtain a character certificate for admission or job purposes.

questions.q: True or False: A formal letter always ends with a postscript.
Write a formal letter to a company inquiring about the availability of a particular product. Give details of the product and the purpose of inquiry.
questions.answer: Sample answer: Start with a formal greeting, introduce the purpose, provide product details, and conclude with a call to action.

questions.q: Choose the correct option: What is the tone of a formal letter? (a) Informal (b) Formal (c) Sarcastic (d) Humorous
Write a formal letter to your school librarian requesting her to purchase some new books for the school library. Give a list of five books you think are essential.
questions.answer: Sample answer: Start with a formal greeting, introduce the purpose, provide the list of books, and conclude with a call to action.

questions.q: What are the essential elements of a formal letter? Explain in 50 words.
questions.answer: Essential elements include a formal greeting, introduction, body, conclusion, and signature.

questions.q: Fill in the blanks: A formal letter is usually written in a _______________ (legible/illegible) handwriting.
Write a formal letter to the Municipal Commissioner of your city complaining about the poor condition of roads in your area. Suggest measures to improve the situation.
questions.answer: Sample answer: Start with a formal greeting, introduce the problem, provide suggestions, and conclude with a call to action.
